title: Three P0 loop-drivers: reminder session routing, false review gate, idle->exploring entry

truths: reminder threads sessionId (bound session sees its own lane phase)
reminder never reports review pending outside a review session
start-feature is the documented atomic idle->exploring entry
prohibitions: never weaken the gate strength — only the reminder's report and the entry path change

trace.outcome: Closed the three P0 loop-drivers from the user's analysis. The prompt reminder now threads sessionId, so a lane-bound session sees its own phase instead of the default idle that pulled it back to hive. The reminder no longer reports the on-demand review gate as pending outside a review session — the false 'gate pending: review' that printed every turn is gone. And bee-exploring now names state start-feature as the atomic idle->exploring entry, ending the owner-mismatch bounce a fresh session hit. Each has a regression test, including a bee-prompt-context lane row that closes the coverage gap which let the sessionId bug survive. Chain 83 suites green both ways.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "red_failure_evidence": "Three P0 loop-drivers the user identified and I confirmed by measurement on v1.11.0, each now with a RED-first-style regression proving the fix: (P0#2) bee-prompt-context.mjs:57 called buildPromptReminder(root) with NO sessionId, so a session bound to a feature lane read the DEFAULT record (usually idle) and got pulled back toward hive; the existing session-threading test covered bee-chain-nudge and bee-session-close but NOT bee-prompt-context — a coverage gap, which is why the bug survived. (P0#5) buildPromptReminder walked all four GATE_NAMES including the on-demand review gate, so once gates 1-3 were approved it printed 'gate pending: review' on EVERY turn — including at idle with nothing active — a false unfinished-workflow signal (visible in this session's own hook output all along). (P0#1) from a fresh idle repo the skill's hand-written 'state set --owner exploring --phase exploring' is refused by the owner guard (owner must equal pre-mutation phase = idle), bouncing the session back to routing; the atomic entry state start-feature was never named in the skill flow.",
  "fixes": "P0#2: the hook now passes { sessionId } (the id it already resolves at line 39). P0#5: the reminder walks the pre-execution gates and includes review ONLY when phase is 'reviewing' (a real review session). P0#1: bee-exploring gains a step 0 that calls state start-feature as the atomic idle->exploring entry and explicitly warns against the naive owner=exploring set from idle.",
  "green_evidence": "Three new/extended tests, all passing: test_misc.mjs asserts the reminder never reports review pending outside a review session, still surfaces context, and DOES surface review when phase is reviewing. test_cli_state.mjs asserts start-feature is the atomic idle->exploring entry, the naive owner=exploring-from-idle is refused, and the forward transition flows after correct entry. test_hook_contracts.mjs gains a bee-prompt-context lane row proving a bound session's reminder reports its lane's phase=swarming (not the default idle) — a regression to the sessionId-less call fails it — plus a row that no false review gate appears. Full chain 83 suites green both with and without the agent-name prefix.",
  "why_it_matters": "These are the three P0 the user's own analysis flagged as the mechanical loop generators, independent of context-window size. Together they stop: a bound session reading the wrong pipeline and re-routing to hive, a false 'pending gate' signal on every turn, and the idle->hive bounce when starting a feature. Measured live before the fix: the reminder said 'gate pending: review' at idle; after, it is silent on gates when none of 1-3 are open and the session is not reviewing.",
  "orchestrator_note": "Edits made in-session with precise control (the review-gate semantics and the lifecycle-test shape are decide-altitude). Canonical hooks live in hooks/ (mirrored to .bee/bin/hooks/); templates/lib mirrored to .bee/bin/lib; both mirror-clean (test_lib_mirror green). Derived artifacts regenerated (plugin trees, manifest, onboarding ledger). The intent-anchor / PreCompact-hook piece that kills the compaction drift is a SEPARATE larger change, proved feasible in the .bee/spikes/intent-anchor spike and deliberately not bundled here — this cell is the low-risk P0 batch the user asked to complete first."
}
